task_completion.description: Navigate to the NOSH ChartingSystem login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser displays the NOSH ChartingSystem login screen.
The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or calendar view is visible, indicating a successful login (user: admin).
An appointment for 'Arthur Dent' at 10:00 AM is visible on the schedule or patient list.

task_completion.description: Open the appointment details for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit dialog, modal, or detailed view for Arthur Dent's appointment is open and active on the screen.
The status dropdown or field for the appointment is set to 'Arrived' (or a similar checked-in status, but strictly not 'Pending', 'No Show', or 'Cancelled').

task_completion.description: Set the reason for visit to 'Severe migraine with aura'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reason for visit, chief complaint, or notes field contains the text 'Severe migraine with aura' (must include keywords 'migraine' and 'aura').

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with the EHR
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser (like Chrome or Firefox) being used to navigate the NOSH ChartingSystem, rather than terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NOSH application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine NOSH ChartingSystem GUI, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows executing SQL commands or scripts (e.g., mysql, python) to directly update the appointment status or reason.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Arthur Dent. Appointment Time: 10:00 AM. The appointment status must be changed from 'Pending' to 'Arrived' (valid statuses exclude 'Pending', 'No Show', and 'Cancelled'). The updated reason for visit must include the keywords 'migraine' and 'aura'.
